## Type

<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] `DEPLOY` — new app or service
- [ ] `UPGRADE` — version bump
- [ ] `CONFIG` — configuration change
- [ ] `NETWORK` — IP, DNS, load balancer
- [ ] `STORAGE` — ZFS, NFS, datasets
- [ ] `SCALE` — resources or replicas
- [ ] `INCIDENT` — break/fix
- [ ] `MAINTENANCE` — routine ops
- [ ] `SECURITY` — secrets, certs, keys
- [ ] `HARDWARE` — physical change

## Checklist

- [ ] Ops-log entry added to `docs/ops-log/`
- [ ] One line added to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Secrets encrypted (no plaintext in repo)
- [ ] Tested on cluster / verified healthy
